lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕੇ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant sahaaee prem ke hau tin kai laagaa paae |
lines.english: The Saints are the helpers of the Lord's lovers; I fall and touch their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਦਰਸਨ ਘਣੀ ਕੋਈ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan piaas darasan ghanee koee aan milaavai maae |
lines.english: My mind and body are so thirsty for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. Won't someone please come and lead me to him, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਨੑੀ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸੁ ਸੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਰਹੇ ਆਘਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee chaakhiaa prem ras se tripat rahe aaghaae |
lines.english: Those who have tasted the sublime essence of His Love, remain satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin prabh kiau sukh paaeeai doojee naahee jaae |
lines.english: Without God, how can I find peace? There is nowhere else to go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਕੰਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈਆ ਸਿ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo har kant milaaeea si vichhurr kateh na jaae |
lines.english: Those whom the Husband Lord has united with Himself, shall not be separated from Him again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਬਿਨਤੀ ਕਰਹਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap tiaag binatee kareh lehu prabhoo larr laae |
lines.english: They renounce their selfishness and conceit, and they pray, "God, please attach me to the hem of Your robe."

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਵਿਣੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh vin doojaa ko nahee naanak har saranaae |
lines.english: Without God, there is no other at all. Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੂ ਸੁਖੀ ਵਸੰਦੀਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: asoo sukhee vasandeea jinaa meaa har raae |8|
lines.english: In Assu, the Lord, the Sovereign King, has granted His Mercy, and they dwell in peace. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਿਕਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: katik karam kamaavane dos na kaahoo jog |
lines.english: In the month of Katak, do good deeds. Do not try to blame anyone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਤੇ ਭੁਲਿਆਂ ਵਿਆਪਨਿ ਸਭੇ ਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: paramesar te bhuliaan viaapan sabhe rog |
lines.english: Forgetting the Transcendent Lord, all sorts of illnesses are contracted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਉੜੇ ਹੋਇ ਗਏ ਜਿਤੜੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਭੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh kaurre hoe ge jitarre maaeaa bhog |
lines.english: In an instant, all of Maya's sensual pleasures turn bitter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਮੁਖ ਹੋਏ ਰਾਮ ਤੇ ਲਗਨਿ ਜਨਮ ਵਿਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: vemukh hoe raam te lagan janam vijog |
lines.english: Those who turn their backs on the Lord shall be separated from Him and consigned to reincarnation, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਕਰਿ ਸਕੈ ਕਿਸ ਥੈ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਰੋਜ ॥
lines.translit: vich na koee kar sakai kis thai roveh roj |
lines.english: No one can then serve as your intermediary. Unto whom can we turn and cry?

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾਂ ਉਤਰਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਬਿਓਗ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee meraa prabh milai taan utareh sabh biog |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I meet my God, and then all pain of separation departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa kichhoo na hovee likhiaa dhur sanjog |
lines.english: By one's own actions, nothing can be done; destiny was pre-determined from the very beginning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਬੰਦੀ ਮੋਚ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kau prabh raakh lehi mere saahib bandee moch |
lines.english: Please protect Nanak, God; O my Lord and Master, please release me from bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਿਕ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਸਭੇ ਸੋਚ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: katik hovai saadhasang binaseh sabhe soch |9|
lines.english: In Katak, in the Company of the Holy, all anxiety vanishes. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਕਿਆ ਗਣੀ ਜਿ ਸਾਹਿਬਿ ਮੇਲੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee sobhaa kiaa ganee ji saahib melarreeaah |
lines.english: How can their glory be measured? Their Lord and Master blends them with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਘਿਰਿ ਮਾਹਿ ਸੋਹੰਦੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੈਠੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: manghir maeh sohandeea har pir sang baittharreeaah |
lines.english: In the month of Maghar, those who sit with their Beloved Husband Lord are beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਸੇ ਰਹਨਿ ਇਕੇਲੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa te baaharee se rehan ikelarreeaah |
lines.english: Those who lack the Company of the Holy, remain all alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧ ਸਹੇਲੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: tan man mauliaa raam siau sang saadh sahelarreeaah |
lines.english: Their bodies and minds blossom forth in the Lord; they have the companionship of the Holy Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਦਿਸਨਿ ਨਿਤ ਖੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: jinee raaviaa prabh aapanaa se disan nit kharreeaah |
lines.english: Those who have ravished and enjoyed their God, are seen to be continually exalted and uplifted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਉਤਰੈ ਸੇ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਪੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: tin dukh na kabahoo utarai se jam kai vas parreeaah |
lines.english: Their pain never departs, and they fall into the grip of the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਲਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਜੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: ratan javehar laal har kantth tinaa jarreeaah |
lines.english: They wear the Necklace of the jewels, emeralds and rubies of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਘਿਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਰਾਧਣਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜਨਮੜੀਆਹ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: manghir prabh aaraadhanaa bahurr na janamarreeaah |10|
lines.english: Those who worship and adore God in Maghar, do not suffer the cycle of reincarnation ever again. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਾਂਛੈ ਧੂੜਿ ਤਿਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣੀ ਦਰਿ ਪੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: naanak baanchhai dhoorr tin prabh saranee dar parreeaah |
lines.english: Nanak seeks the dust of the feet of those who take to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਖਿ ਤੁਖਾਰੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪਈ ਕੰਠਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: pokh tukhaar na viaapee kantth miliaa har naahu |
lines.english: In the month of Poh, the cold does not touch those, whom the Husband Lord hugs close in His Embrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਚਰਨਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਲਗੜਾ ਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: man bedhiaa charanaarabind darasan lagarraa saahu |
lines.english: Their minds are transfixed by His Lotus Feet. They are attached to the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਟ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਰਾਇ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਲਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: ott govind gopaal raae sevaa suaamee laahu |
lines.english: Seek the Protection of the Lord of the Universe; His service is truly profitable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਪੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa pohi na sakee mil saadhoo gun gaahu |
lines.english: Corruption shall not touch you, when you join the Holy Saints and sing the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੀ ਤਹ ਮਿਲੀ ਸਚੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਮਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh te upajee teh milee sachee preet samaahu |
lines.english: From where it originated, there the soul is blended again. It is absorbed in the Love of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੀ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੀਆਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar geh leenee paarabraham bahurr na vichhurreeaahu |
lines.english: When the Supreme Lord God grasps someone's hand, he shall never again suffer separation from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਿ ਜਾਉ ਲਖ ਬੇਰੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: baar jaau lakh bereea har sajan agam agaahu |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, 100,000 times, to the Lord, my Friend, the Unapproachable and Unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਮ ਪਈ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਿ ਪਈਆਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: saram pee naaraaeinai naanak dar peeaahu |
lines.english: Please preserve my honor, Lord; Nanak begs at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਖੁ ਸੋੁਹੰਦਾ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: pokh souhandaa sarab sukh jis bakhase veparavaahu |11|
lines.english: Poh is beautiful, and all comforts come to that one, whom the Carefree Lord has forgiven. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਘਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂਆ ਧੂੜੀ ਕਰਿ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: maagh majan sang saadhooaa dhoorree kar isanaan |
lines.english: In the month of Maagh, let your cleansing bath be the dust of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਕਰਮ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਜਾਇ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: janam karam mal utarai man te jaae gumaan |
lines.english: In this way, the filth of lifetimes of karma shall be removed, and egotistical pride shall vanish from your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਨੋ ਕਰਿ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam dhiaae sun sabhanaa no kar daan |
lines.english: Meditate and listen to the Name of the Lord, and give it to everyone.
